prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.2 kg; Height 169.1 cm; BMI 20.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 189mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 183mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.2kg; 9 months ago 55.9kg; 6 months ago 58.3kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 57.2kg), Height (12 months ago 169.1cm; 9 months ago 169.1cm; 6 months ago 169.1cm; 3 months ago 169.1cm; current 169.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 113U/L; 6 months ago 108U/L; 3 months ago 107U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 63U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 58U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.7mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.7mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 275mg/g; 9 months ago 315mg/g; 6 months ago 343mg/g; 3 months ago 371mg/g; current 429mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 11.1g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.51 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
